chapter_title.en: The Way in Which Allāh, the Great and Almighty, Honours Those Who Go to the Ziyārah of Ĥusain ibn ‘Ali (a.s.)

text: 2 وَ رَوَى صَالِحٌ الصَّيْرَفِيُّ عَنْ عِمْرَانَ الْمِيثَمِيِّ عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ مِيثَمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) قَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَلَى مَوَائِدِ النُّورِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ- فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ زُوَّارِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ع

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 2. Sāliḥ Al-Sayrafi narrated from ‘Imrān Al-Maythami, from Sāliḥ ibn Maytham, who said: Abū ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)) said: Those who desire sitting at MAWĀ`ID made of light on the Day of Judgment should go to the Ziyārah of Ḥusain ibn ‘Ali (a.s.).
